pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.2.13.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x is required for compatibility with the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Change Swagger annotations group ID to reflect the migration to Swagger Core v3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old group ID 'io.swagger' is deprecated/removed in favor of 'io.swagger.core.v3' in newer versions, causing dependency resolution failures.
